query:
WITH LatestChanges AS (
                SELECT code,primeseq,state,effdate,classcode,seqcode,territory,exmod,minprem,exposure,premium,rate,xcluamt,losscons,form,paragraph,volcomp,hazard,cvrg,disctype,classuffix,diffprem,diffrate,rateeffdate,losscost,__$operation,__$start_lsn,__$seqval, 
                ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY code,primeseq,state,effdate,classcode,seqcode,territory,rateeffdate,volcomp ORDER BY [__$seqval] DESC) AS rn 
                FROM [cdc].[dbo_wcpayrol_CT] 
                WHERE [__$operation] IN (1, 2, 4) AND __$start_lsn > 0x0
            )
            SELECT code,primeseq,state,effdate,classcode,seqcode,territory,exmod,minprem,exposure,premium,rate,xcluamt,losscons,form,paragraph,volcomp,hazard,cvrg,disctype,classuffix,diffprem,diffrate,rateeffdate,losscost,__$operation,__$start_lsn,__$seqval FROM LatestChanges WHERE rn = 1
